title: Judelow's kill sound
description: This resource pack adds a kill sound used in Judelow's videos
body:
**Credit to : bendy1234**

### **_Adds Death sound used in Judelow's videos_**

This resourse pack is made to **_add sound after you kill somebody_**.

Also can be used as _**death sound**_.                                                           
~~_...................................._~~
